title: erigeron kumaunensis
intro: Erigeron kumaunensis, also known as Himalayan fleabane or Kumaun daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Erigeron kumaunensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Erigeron kumaunensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
